zh.homeIntro1: 彼得·杜诺夫（Peter Deunov，1864年7月11日—1944年12月27日），灵性名贝因萨·杜诺（Beinsa Douno），是保加利亚灵性导师、哲学家、音乐家，「白色兄弟会」（Universal White Brotherhood）的创始人。他毕业于美国波士顿大学神学院，融合基督教神秘主义与东方哲学，创立了独特的灵性教学体系。
zh.homeIntro2: 杜诺夫一生讲授了超过七千场讲座，留下大量关于人类灵性进化的教导。他最广为流传的是1944年临终前口述的预言，描述了地球即将经历的巨大转变——第六种族的到来、爱的文明的建立，以及人类意识的整体提升。
zh.homeIntro3: 爱因斯坦曾评价杜诺夫说：「全世界都向我鞠躬，而我向杜诺夫大师鞠躬。」本站整理了杜诺夫的核心预言与教导，涵盖第六种族、地球转变、二战预测、斯拉夫使命等主题，并对已到期的预言进行了验证分析。
zh.coreQuote: 「第六种族将在爱的原则上建立自己的文明。届时将有一个新大陆为他们而形成。在你们周围即将融化的冰块中，这个新地球的种子正在沉睡。」
keyPointsList: 1897年 —— 杜诺夫开始在保加利亚传道，创立灵性运动
1914年 —— 预言世界大战即将爆发，呼吁保加利亚保持中立
1918年 —— 在索菲亚建立公开讲座体系，吸引数千追随者
1944年 —— 口述临终预言，描述第六种族与地球转变，同年12月27日去世
1944年后 —— 弟子彼得·甘姆切夫传播其教导，白色兄弟会扩展至全球
sourceList: 预言内容主要来自杜诺夫1944年临终预言及其讲座记录（Wikipedia）
弟子记录的讲座文本存档于白色兄弟会（beinsadouno.org）
验证评价基于公开新闻报道和历史记录
编者观点不代表学术定论
站点图标采用五芒星符号——白色兄弟会的核心标志，代表人类灵性进化的五个原则

en.homeIntro1: Peter Deunov (July 11, 1864 – December 27, 1944), spiritual name Beinsa Douno, was a Bulgarian spiritual teacher, philosopher, and musician who founded the Universal White Brotherhood. He graduated from Boston University School of Theology and developed a unique spiritual teaching system blending Christian mysticism with Eastern philosophy.
en.homeIntro2: Throughout his life, Deunov delivered over seven thousand lectures, leaving extensive teachings on humanity's spiritual evolution. His most widely circulated work is his 1944 deathbed prophecy, describing Earth's imminent great transformation — the coming of the Sixth Race, the establishment of a civilization of love, and the collective elevation of human consciousness.
en.homeIntro3: Albert Einstein reportedly said of Deunov: 'The whole world bows to me, and I bow to the Master Peter Deunov.' This site compiles Deunov's core prophecies and teachings, covering the Sixth Race, Earth's transformation, WWII predictions, and the Slavic mission, with verification analysis for expired predictions.
en.coreQuote: "The Sixth Race will build its civilization on the principle of love. A new continent will form for them. In the ice that is about to melt around you, the seeds of this new Earth are sleeping."
keyPointsList: 1897 —— Deunov began preaching in Bulgaria, founding his spiritual movement
1914 —— Prophesied the coming world war, urged Bulgaria to remain neutral
1918 —— Established public lecture series in Sofia, attracting thousands of followers
1944 —— Dictated his deathbed prophecy about the Sixth Race and Earth's transformation; passed away December 27
Post-1944 —— Disciple Omraam Mikhaël Aïvanhov spread his teachings; the White Brotherhood expanded globally
sourceList: Prophecies primarily sourced from Deunov's 1944 deathbed prophecy and lecture transcripts (Wikipedia)
Lecture transcripts archived by the Universal White Brotherhood (beinsadouno.org)
Verification based on public news reports and historical records
Editorial opinions do not represent academic consensus
Site icon: pentagram symbol — the core emblem of the Universal White Brotherhood, representing the five principles of human spiritual evolution
